parameters.query:
SELECT id, slug, name, config, active
FROM caiac.clients
WHERE slug = '{{ $("Check Token Valid").item.json.slug }}'
LIMIT 1

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $json.chat_model, stream: false, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: $json.system_prompt }, { role: 'user', content: $json.message }] }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ response: $('Format Direct Response').item.json.response, sources: $('Format Direct Response').item.json.sources, session_id: $('Format Direct Response').item.json.session_id, message_index: $('Format Direct Response').item.json.message_index }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ vector: $json.embedding, limit: ($('Validate Request').item.json.search_limit ?? 5) + 10, with_payload: true, filter: { must: [{ key: 'role', match: { any: $('Validate Request').item.json.allowed_roles } }] } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ filter: { must: [{ key: 'type', match: { value: 'chat_history' } }, { key: 'session_id', match: { value: $('Validate Request').item.json.session_id } }] }, limit: 8, with_payload: true }) }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO caiac.audit_log (client_id, user_id, action, detail)
VALUES (
    '{{ $("Check Token Valid").item.json.client_id }}',
    '{{ $("Check Token Valid").item.json.user_id }}',
    'chat',
    '{"session_id": "{{ $("Check Token Valid").item.json.session_id }}", "role": "{{ $("Check Token Valid").item.json.role }}", "message_length": {{ $("Receive Chat Request").item.json.body.message.length }}, "sources_count": {{ $("Format Response").item.json.sources.length }}}'
)
RETURNING id, created_at;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ response: $('Format Response').item.json.response, sources: $('Format Response').item.json.sources, session_id: $('Format Response').item.json.session_id, message_index: $('Format Response').item.json.message_index }) }}
